description:
This quiz tests advanced knowledge of context engineering in AI systems, covering technical aspects like context windows, token budgets, retrieval, prompt structure, and failure modes in production deployments. It starts at a medium difficulty but escalates to challenge experienced practitioners, using a direct and educational tone to bridge demo concepts with real-world implementation.
Topics: context windows, token budgets, retrieval, prompt structure, failure modes in production AI
Audience: AI practitioners, developers working with LLMs, and those aiming to build production-ready AI systems beyond basic demos.
